TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Kalahaay, title = Kalahaay, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Kalahaay} }

S.FORM: Kalahaay Itiniay i Chenggong Cen no Taitung ko Kalahaay a niyaro', 738 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 2,154 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 15% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 316 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 85% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 1,838 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Amis 13%, Paiwan 0.4%, Puyuma 0.4%, roma 0.5%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'. Ira ko kofa i niyaro'. Ira ko paisingan i niyaro'.
S.PHON: kaɾaħaaj itiniaj i ʦħəŋ*o~uŋ ʦən no~u taito~u~uŋ ko~u kaɾaħaaj a nijaro~uʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *,*** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin , po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *,*** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u amis **%, paiwan *.*%, po~u~ujo~u~uma *.*%, ro~uma *.*%. ira ko~u piʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u ko~ufa i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u paisiŋan i nijaro~uʡ.
S.FORM: Kalahaay Itiniay i Chenggong Cen no Taitung ko Kalahaay a niyaro', 738 ko sa'osi no parod no loma', 2,154 ko sa'osi no tamdaw. 15% ko ka'aloman no Yincomin , polong han i, 316 ko tamdaw; o roma sato i, 85% ko ka'aloman no roma a finacadan, polong han i, 1,838 ko tamdaw. O pa-sin-to no ka'aloman no tamdaw no kasafinacadan i, ko Amis 13%, Paiwan 0.4%, Puyuma 0.4%, roma 0.5%. Ira ko picodadan i niyaro'. Ira ko kofa i niyaro'. Ira ko paisingan i niyaro'.
S.PHON: kaɾaħaaj itiniaj i ʦħəŋ*o~uŋ ʦən no~u taito~u~uŋ ko~u kaɾaħaaj a nijaro~uʡ, *** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u paro~uɬ~ɮ no~u ɾo~umaʡ, *,*** ko~u saʡo~usi no~u tamɬ~ɮaw. **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u jinʦo~umin , po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw; o~u ro~uma sato~u i, **% ko~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u ro~uma a finaʦaɬ~ɮan, po~uɾo~uŋ ħan i, *,*** ko~u tamɬ~ɮaw. o~u pa-sin-to~u no~u kaʡaɾo~uman no~u tamɬ~ɮaw no~u kasafinaʦaɬ~ɮan i, ko~u amis **%, paiwan *.*%, po~u~ujo~u~uma *.*%, ro~uma *.*%. ira ko~u piʦo~uɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮan i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u ko~ufa i nijaro~uʡ. ira ko~u paisiŋan i nijaro~uʡ.
